allow: Bash(git add App.tsx components/FloatingActions.tsx components/Layout.tsx components/ScrollToTop.tsx components/AccessibilityWidget.tsx components/BackgroundMusic.tsx components/CookieBanner.tsx pages/PrivacyPolicy.tsx index.css index.html translations.ts)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add comprehensive accessibility features and legal compliance

Major features added:
- Cookie consent banner \(Amendment 13 compliant, GTM Consent Mode v2\)
- Privacy policy page \(13 sections, 4 languages, IS 5568 compliant\)
- Accessibility widget \(10 features, WCAG 2.0 AA compliant\)
- Background music player with auto-play and volume control
- Improved floating actions \(50% transparency, repositioned\)
- Scroll-to-top button with visual feedback

Technical updates:
- Added GTM head snippet with default consent state
- Updated translations with new keys
- Added comprehensive accessibility CSS styles
- All components support Hebrew, Arabic, English, Russian

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

EOF
\)")
